zh.lifeSummary: 當Thibaut V de Blois於1130年出生在法國洛易-吉黑布盧瓦時，他的父親Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois37歲，母親Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim22歲。他於從1150年到1160年與Sibylle de Château-Renard結婚。他於1190年登記服兵役。他去世於1191年1月20日在巴勒斯坦منطقة الشمالعكّا享年61歲，埋葬在法國布格-福朗-可特艾朋迪尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thibaut V de Blois于1130年出生在法国洛易-吉黑布盧瓦时，他的父亲Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois37岁，母亲Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim22岁。他于从1150年到1160年与Sibylle de Château-Renard结婚。他于1190年登记服兵役。他去世于1191年1月20日在巴勒斯坦منطقة الشمالعكّا享年61岁，埋葬在法国布格-福朗-可特艾朋迪尼。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Blois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Blois in Loire-et-Cher and, in some cases possibly also from a place of the same name in Jura. Compare   Deblois  .
French: nickname from the Old French adjective blois ‘lisping’.

variants.name: Bloise
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rolando, Salvatore, Biagio, Carmelo, Giulio.  Spanish Alejandro, Ines, Jose, Juan Antonio, Luis.
Italian (Calabria): from French Blois . The surname Bloise is also found in southern France (Bouches-du-Rhône) and in the Dominican Republic.
English (Suffolk): variant of   Blois  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Deblois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Rosaire, Amelie, Damien, Emile, Fernand, Herve, Jacques, Jean Guy, Monique, Ovide.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from Blois (see Blois ).

nameMeanings.name: Thibaut
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Thibaut V de Blois was born in 1130, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, France, his father, Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois, was 37 and his mother, Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, was 22. He married Sibylle de Château-Renard from 1150 to 1160. He registered for military service in 1190. He died on 20 January 1191, in Acre, Northern, Palestine, at the age of 61, and was buried in Pontigny, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thibaut V de Blois est né en 1130, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, France, son père, Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Sibylle de Château-Renard du 1150 au 1160. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1190. Il est décédé le 20 janvier 1191, à Acre, Northern, Palestine, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Pontigny, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

de.Fontevraud-l'Abbaye, Departement de Main: Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Thibaut V de Blois 1130 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois 37 und seine Mutter Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim 22. Er hat von 1150 bis 1160 Sibylle de Château-Renard geheiratet. Er hat sich 1190 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 20. Januar 1191 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Acre, Northern, Palästina und wurde in Pontigny, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thibaut V de Blois è nato il nel 1130 nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Francia, il suo padre, Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Sibylle de Château-Renard da 1150 a 1160. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1190. Morì il 20 gennaio 1191, nel Acre, Northern, Palestina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Pontigny, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Thibaut V de Bloisが1130年にフランスロイル-エト-チャーブロイスで生まれた時，父Thibaut IV le Grand de Bloisは37歳，母Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheimは22歳であった。から1150年まで1160年にSibylle de Château-Renardと結婚した。彼は1190年に兵役登録をした。彼は1191年1月20日にパレスチナمنطقة الشمالعكّاで61歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeイオンポンティグニーにて埋葬された。

ko.Fontevraud-l'Abbaye, Departement de Main: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이
ko.lifeSummary: Thibaut V de Blois(이)가 1130년 프랑스 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1150년 부터 1160년 까지 Sibylle de Château-Renard(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1190년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1191년 1월 20일 팔레스타인 منطقة الشمال عكّا에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 욘 폰티그니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thibaut V de Blois nasceu em 1130, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, França, seu pai, Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Sibylle de Château-Renard de 1150 a 1160. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1190. Ele faleceu em 20 de janeiro de 1191, em Acre, Northern, Palestina, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Pontigny, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thibaut V de Blois родился в 1130 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, Франция, его отцу по имени Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibylle de Château-Renard с 1150 по 1160. В 1190 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 20 января 1191 г. в местности عكّا, منطقة الشمال, Палестина в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности понтигни, енн, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thibaut V de Blois nació en 1130, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Francia, su papá, Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sibylle de Château-Renard desde 1150 hasta 1160. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1190. Murió el 20 de enero de 1191, en Acre, Northern, Palestina, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Pontigny, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.
